title: No more Latvian repatriation flights deemed necessary
summary_full: With four repatriation flights having already brought Latvians home from the war-torn Middle East, no additional flights are now required, according to the Ministry of Foreign Affairs (MFA).
summary_public: With four repatriation flights having already brought Latvians home from the war-torn Middle East, no additional flights are now required, according to the Ministry of Foreign Affairs (MFA).
